title: Kid Loki
content:
{{Otheruses|Loki}} {{CharHub|Kid Loki|Loki}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Kid Thor Killed Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Kid Loki-official.jpg |real name = Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}This character's surname is derived from a Variant from ''[[Thor: The Dark World Prelude|Thor: The Dark World Prelude, Issue 2]]'' and thus is conjecturally treated as the same.{{Ref|LK105}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Kid Loki{{Ref|LK105}}}} |species = [[Frost Giant]] |gender = Fluid{{Ref|LokiTVAFile}} |citizenship = [[Jotunheim|Jotun]] (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG1}} (formerly) |title = King of the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]
Prince of [[Asgard]] (formerly) |affiliation = {{Affiliation|ASGKTK}} (formerly)
[[Kid Loki's Crew]] |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[The Nexus Event]]''
*''[[Journey Into Mystery]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[Jack Veal]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Whenever one of [[Hub:Loki|us]] dares try to fix themselves, the [[TVA]] sends us [[Void (End of Time)|here]] to die.|Kid Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} King '''Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}''' is a Variant of [[Loki]] who murdered his adoptive brother [[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]]. He was subsequently arrested by the [[Time Variance Authority]], who pruned his timeline and exiled him to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where he became a ruler and befriended [[Hub:Loki|alternate versions]] of himself. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Killing Thor==== {{Quote|What was your nexus event, Your Majesty?"
"I killed [[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]].|[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and Kid Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} In his reality within the Sacred Timeline,{{Ref|WaldronInterview1}} Loki killed [[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]] when they were children. This nexus event caused him to be arrested by the [[Time Variance Authority]]. He was then pruned and sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]].{{Ref|LK105}} ===King of the Void=== {{Quote|You'll do well to respect the boy. [[Void (End of Time)|This]] is his kingdom.|[[Classic Loki]] to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} [[File:The Tree Amigos.png|{{AltFloat}}|Kid Loki meets [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]]] After killing his adoptive brother, Thor, Kid Loki was arrested and pruned by the TVA and ended up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] with many of his other alternate selves. Among the Lokis, Kid Loki was immensely powerful and respected due to him managing to kill Thor in his timeline, which earned him the unofficial position of King of the Void. He also befriended several other Loki Variants, including [[Classic Loki]], [[Boastful Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]], living with them in a secret underground bunker. During their time in the Void, the group focused exclusively on surviving the looming threat of [[Alioth]] and avoiding rival Loki Variants.{{Ref|LK105}} While traveling across the Void, Kid Loki and his allies stumbled across a new [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]] and helped him escape the all-consuming monster Alioth. Though the new Loki was confused, his yelling almost attracted Alioth, to which Kid Loki silenced him using the [[Laevateinn]]. The group warned Loki of Alioth's power and bickered about their plans to leave as Kid Loki ordered the others to follow him. Loki followed shortly after and questioned why the others followed Kid Loki's orders as he revealed that he killed [[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]]. Soon, the group made their way to the [[Loki Palace]].{{Ref|LK104}} ====[[Ambush at the Loki Palace]]==== [[File:Vlp5020 105 comp v007.1034 r 0.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|The group is ambushed by [[President Loki]] and his army]] {{Quote|[[Loki/New York Time Heist|You]] bastard! You led the wolves to our door."
"We prefer snakes to wolves."
"I've eaten both. They die just the same.|[[Classic Loki]], [[President Loki]] and Kid Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} Once the group arrived at the [[Loki Palace]], the group settled down and each Variant recalled their origins and how they ended up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. Confiding in this moment through a toast, [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] got up and tried to make his way out, hoping to escape the Void, but the others stopped him, warning him that his plan would not work. However, Loki told them about [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] and tried to rally the group, but they laughed at him. Annoyed, Loki tried to leave the Palace, but was stopped by [[President Loki]] and his army of Loki Variants. President Loki and his army raided the Palace and surrounded the group, who was angered at Loki, as Loki watched from the side. As Kid Loki tried to confront President Loki, [[Boastful Loki]] betrayed Kid Loki and held him hostage, revealing to work with President Loki. However, President Loki also betrayed Boastful Loki, revealing that he had other plans to take the throne. President Loki's army also betrayed him as [[Alligator Loki]] approached President Loki. Questioning his presence, Alligator Loki chomped off President Loki's hand as a battle between the Lokis began. Kid Loki grabbed Alligator Loki as the two, alongside [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Classic Loki]], made their escape through Classic Loki's portal.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Aiding His Alternate Selves==== [[File:Three Lokis watch Alioth destroy the USS Eldridge.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]], [[Classic Loki]] and Kid Loki observe [[Alioth]]]] {{Quote|You boys want a ticket out of [[Void (End of Time)|here]]?"
"No. We're staying here.|[[Mobius M. Mobius]] and Kid Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} Walking through the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] after their escape from the [[Loki Palace]], Kid Loki and [[Classic Loki]] were enraged by the fact that any change a Loki made to himself would result in his demise in the Void. [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] told them that [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Sylvie]] could help them escape the Void as Kid Loki was persuaded in helping Loki. Classic Loki would be persuaded shortly after, though would only help Loki approach [[Alioth]]. The group made their way to Alioth's position as Loki explained his plan. Seeing Alioth in action against the {{WPS|USS Eldridge}}, Loki decided to rethink his plan over. In the distance, Laufeydottir and [[Mobius M. Mobius]] made their way to the group in a pizza van. As Laufeydottir got out, Loki rushed to reunite with her and Mobius, though Kid Loki and Classic Loki were confused. Walking over, Loki got the group acquainted with Laufeydottir and Mobius. Loki told Laufeydottir that they were going to kill Alioth, but Laufeydottir was in disbelief and questioned the others' beliefs in him. Kid Loki and Classic Loki hesitated as Laufeydottir told Loki that the [[He Who Remains|person]] they were after was contained in Alioth. Making refuge in a dilapidated building, Mobius pondered on the Variants and the thoughts of a Loki. Kid Loki asked Mobius about what he would do once he was back in the [[Time Variance Authority|TVA]]. Mobius responded that he would tell everyone the truth, though Classic Loki questioned him turning on his duty. Kid Loki hoped Loki's and Laufeydottir's plan would work as they rested. [[File:KidLokiHandingOverSword.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Kid Loki hands [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] the [[Laevateinn]]]] Sometime later, the group made their way once more to confront [[Alioth]]. As [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] finished telling the others her plan, the group began to make their goodbyes as [[Mobius M. Mobius]] asked the Variants if they wanted to go with him. However, they denied on the offer, opting to stay in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] as they knew how to survive. Kid Loki offered and handed [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] the [[Laevateinn]] to help him distract Alioth as he, alongside [[Classic Loki]] and [[Alligator Loki]], left the group.{{Ref|LK105}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''[[Magic]]''': Kid Loki is a powerful and skilled sorcerer, capable of using [[magic]] to produce various effects. **'''Conjuration''': Kid Loki is able to summon objects according to his own will, such as instantly summoning his [[Laevateinn|sword]] when needed for combat. He threatened [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] with his sword, then used magic to make it disappear in an instant. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Tactician''': Kid Loki is the proclaimed King of the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and survived for a long time. He deduced a plan that allowed him to kill [[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]], which caused him to be pruned. His decisions often stemmed from protecting [[Alligator Loki]], who he cared much for. During the [[Ambush at the Loki Palace]], Kid Loki quickly grabbed Alligator Loki and fled from the scuffle. When [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] told him his plan for [[Alioth]], Kid Loki decided it was best to stay out of it, but gave Loki [[Laevateinn]] to help him. *'''Bilingualism''': Kid Loki is fluent in English and Alligator. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Laevateinn]]''': Kid Loki possessed an Asgardian flaming dagger or short sword that is able to generate fire. Later, he gave the sword to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Horned Helmet|Winged Crown]]''': Unlike any other Loki, Kid Loki wears a winged crown that has small, V-shaped horns resembling the symbol on his chest. *'''[[Pruning Detection Device]]''': Kid Loki uses to locates pruned branch realities that are transferred to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. ==Facilities== *'''[[Loki Palace]]''': The makeshift group [[Classic Loki|of]] [[Alligator Loki|other]] [[Boastful Loki|Lokis]] made refuge underground in a makeshift bunker with a collection of pruned relics and redesigned this bunker as their base. *'''[[Dom's Cuts]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Asgardian Royal Family/Kid Thor Killed|Asgardian Royal Family]] **[[Thor/Kid Thor Killed|Thor]] † - Adoptive Brother and Victim ===Allies=== *[[Kid Loki's Crew]] - Alternate Selves **[[Classic Loki]] † **[[Alligator Loki]] - Friend **[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] - Alternate Self *[[Mobius M. Mobius]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Time Variance Authority]] *[[Alioth]] - Attempted Killer *[[Loki Bandits]] - Alternate Selves **[[President Loki]] **[[Mustache Loki]] **[[Glamshades Loki]] **[[Bicycle Loki]] **[[Pokey Loki]] **[[Warrior Loki]] **[[Ninja Loki]] **[[Assassin Loki]] **[[Goth Loki]] **[[Military Loki]] *[[Boastful Loki]] - Alternate Self and Former Ally {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Kid Loki was the reincarnated version of Loki after he was killed, and ended up joining the joined the [[w:c:marvel:Young Avengers|Young Avengers]]. Kid Loki's outfit is also a reference to his appearance in the comics. *According to [[Jack Veal]], Kid Loki is the oldest Variant in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], having been pruned thousands of years before the events of the season.{{Ref|KidLokiOld}} ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Bobby Souris]] was a stunt double for [[Jack Veal]] in the role of Kid Loki. ==References== {{Gallery|Kid Loki/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} [[es:Loki Niño]] [[ru:Кид Локи]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Frost Giants]] [[Category:Genderfluid Characters]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:Sorcerers]] [[Category:Gods]] [[Category:Asgardian Royal Family Members/Kid Thor Killed]] [[Category:Kid Loki's Crew Leaders]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]] [[Category:Pruned]]
